instructions: Origami cone-filter recipe tailored for wet-hulled Sumatra-style beans. Lower temperature (89C) prevents extracting harsh phenolic compounds common in wet-hulled processing. Coarser grind and slow pours bring out smooth chocolate and warm spice while minimizing earthy bitterness. Bloom with a gentle swirl to saturate the uneven cell structure of wet-hulled beans. Use a conical filter for faster drawdown suited to dark roast solubility.
